name: Frontend Architecture
points: Designed a schema-driven form engine to power complex multi-step workflows with dynamic validation and extensibility.
Contributed to a centralized design system, making components more reusable and keeping the UI consistent across applications.
Built a micro-frontend setup with Module Federation for 4 interdependent SPAs.
Rebuilt a legacy frontend using #vue Vue, shaping a more maintainable architecture and pushing test coverage of functional scenarios beyond the status-quo.
Redesigned client-side API batching behaviour to eliminate sequential waterfall requests.

name: Performance Optimization
points: Improved Core Web Vitals by fixing tree-shaking issues, introducing code-splitting, and enabling gzip compression.
Switched the build system from legacy tooling to #vite Vite, cutting down build times and making development loops much faster.

name: Testing & Quality
points: Built a functional testing setup (#playwright Playwright) integrated with CI/CD.
Put together an end-to-end, CICD integrated, API testing framework, using #postman Postman (Newman), covering AuthN/AuthZ flows.
Established a high-coverage testing strategy (>90%) to keep large-scale changes stable over time.

name: Cloud & Infrastructure
points: Migrated two applications to #azure Azure, setting up networking, compute, storage, and serverless components end-to-end.
Built a reusable IaC library with #bicep Bicep, along with automated versioning for consistent deployments.
Delivered Azure automation workflows (network provisioning, Key Vault rotation, DevOps pipelines).
Built a serverless ETL pipeline using Node.js and #function Azure Functions for scalable data processing.
Cut infrastructure costs by aligning workloads with the right cloud resources.

name: Backend & Distributed Systems
points: Designed and maintained #spring Spring Boot micro-services, including #kafka Kafka producers/consumers, batch jobs, REST APIs and standalone components/libraries.
Worked with event-driven and service-based architectures to support scalable backend workflows.

name: Observability
points: Built monitoring and alerting systems (Azure Workspace/Monitor) with metrics dashboards and automated incident triggers.

name: Developer Experience
points: Modernized multiple apps with #nodejs Node.js upgrades, Pinia for state management, and Composition API.
Configured #docker Docker-based local environments to make complex testing setups reproducible and easier to work with.
Mentored engineers and conducted internal sessions on #react React, #vue Vue, and micro-frontends.

name: Product & UX
points: Created high-fidelity UI mockups and static designs using #figma Figma, enabling faster iteration through continuous feedback with stakeholders.
Provided technical oversight for major features and structural refactoring as a primary code reviewer.

name: Tooling & Automation
points: Built database migration tooling in #java Java and #react React, including a semantic analyzer and an automated documentation generator.
